CharSetProber)
ProbingStatec
d d!
UTF1632Proberad
    This class simply looks for occurrences of zero bytes, and infers
    whether the file is UTF16 or UTF32 (low-endian or big-endian)
    For instance, files looking like ( 
 [nonzero] )+
    have a good probability to be UTF32BE.  Files looking like ( 
 [nonzero] )+
    may be guessed to be UTF16BE, and inversely for little-endian varieties.
    
super
__init__
position
zeros_at_mod
nonzeros_at_modr
	DETECTING
_state
quad
invalid_utf16be
invalid_utf16le
invalid_utf32be
invalid_utf32le
'first_half_surrogate_pair_detected_16be
'first_half_surrogate_pair_detected_16le
reset
self
	__class__
9/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/chardet/utf1632prober.pyr

UTF1632Prober.is_likely_utf32bec
UTF1632Prober.is_likely_utf32lec
UTF1632Prober.is_likely_utf16bec
UTF1632Prober.is_likely_utf16lec
        Validate if the quad of bytes is valid UTF-32.
        UTF-32 is valid in the range 0x00000000 - 0x0010FFFF
        excluding 0x0000D800 - 0x0000DFFF
        https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UTF-32
        r
validate_utf32_characters
z'UTF1632Prober.validate_utf32_charactersc
        Validate if the pair of bytes is  valid UTF-16.
        UTF-16 is valid in the range 0x0000 - 0xFFFF excluding 0xD800 - 0xFFFF
        with an exception for surrogate pairs, which must be in the range
        0xD800-0xDBFF followed by 0xDC00-0xDFFF
        https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UTF-16
        r1
pairr
validate_utf16_characters
z'UTF1632Prober.validate_utf16_charactersc
